reforms.description: The Federal Government adopted a medium-term public investment programme totaling DM 16 billion aimed at stimulating economic growth, improving economic infrastructure, enhancing the environment, and supporting demand for building and construction.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The investment programme is designed to stimulate economic growth and improve infrastructure, which are expected to enhance productivity and economic activity.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been adopted and is currently in force.
reforms.importance_rationale: The programme represents a significant structural change in public investment strategy.
reforms.source_quote: The medium-term public investment programme totalling DM 16 billion over a period of 4 years.

reforms.description: The reform of the corporate profits tax eliminates double taxation of distributed profits, which is expected to have a favorable effect on business investment in the medium run by increasing the effective rate of return on equity capital.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By increasing the effective rate of return on equity capital, the reform is expected to incentivize business investment, thereby supporting economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The reform has been enacted and is currently in effect.
reforms.importance_rationale: The elimination of double taxation represents a significant change in the corporate tax structure, impacting business investment.
reforms.source_quote: The reform of the corporate profits tax, eliminating double taxation of distributed profits, effective 1st January, 1977.
